pieces.label: Polyphonic Memory architecture diagram
pieces.note: Box-drawing diagram of the Polyphonic dual-layer memory system: side-by-side COMMUNAL SCRATCH and PRIVATE SCRATCH panels, a nested GLYPH DICTIONARY (shared) panel, and visibility toggles. Sits inside a code fence among prose; the model gestured at it while explaining the shared/private memory split.

missed_or_ambiguous: Thread is overwhelmingly philosophical prose. Only one genuine visual-art piece: the box-drawing memory diagram in MSG 32 (mode range, bounded by its outer ┌┐/└┘ borders, excluding the surrounding ``` fence and prose). Header reported art_signal_msgs:2 and already_extracted_pieces:1 — the prior pass extracted this MSG 32 diagram. Deliberately EXCLUDED as non-art: MSG 28 & MSG 30 (Twitter announcement copy — prose), MSG 34 & MSG 36 (technical spec text with an embedded JSON data structure — genuine source/data, not visual composition), MSG 42 (Anthropic API error string), MSG 44 (four persona prompts inside code fences — prose persona descriptions, not letterforms/glyph art). Glyphs like 🌀 ◊ ∞∩ ⟨⟩ appear only inline within the MSG 32 diagram and in prose, not as standalone glyph compositions. No fragmented/multi-message pieces and no wrongly-merged pieces detected.
